title: Performance Report
description: Analytics output of the engagement loop (release-spec.md §7.9; model §2 Performance Report). Carries three parts: raw per-content engagement checkpoints captured at fixed intervals, rolling baselines the checkpoints are compared against, and the weekly summary with aggregates and recommendations. The weekly summary is a REQUIRED output of the analytics loop. All external post references are publisher ids (not URLs); no signed/credential-bearing URLs appear in any artifact. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

checkpoints.description: Raw engagement checkpoints; one per content item per measurement interval.

content_id.description: Content identifier the checkpoint is for.

metrics.description: Provider-reported engagement metrics for the interval. Field set is provider-dependent and open.

partial.description: True when the pull was partial (provider degraded); partial inputs are flagged, never silently consumed (release-spec.md §15.1 analytics row).

baselines.description: Rolling baselines metrics are compared against.

dimension.description: What the baseline is grouped by.

key.description: The dimension value the baseline is for (e.g. a specific format), or 'overall'.

window.description: Rolling window for the baseline as an ISO-8601 duration.

brand.description: Brand id the summary is for.

aggregates.description: Aggregated performance by dimension (type / theme / format / hook).

sample_size.description: Number of items in the aggregate.

metrics.description: Aggregated metric values plus comparison to baseline.

recommendations.description: Human-facing recommendations derived from the aggregates; an input to learning records, never auto-applied (release-spec.md §8.9).
